question.question_text: What will the USD/CHF exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of a major currency pair like USD/CHF, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption), as daily exchange rate changes are largely unpredictable. The USD/CHF pair typically has a daily volatility of around 0.4-0.6%. Using approximately 0.35% as the standard deviation for a 50% CI (roughly ±0.67 sigma), 0.5% for 80% CI (roughly ±1.28 sigma), and 0.65% for 90% CI (roughly ±1.645 sigma), I constructed intervals around the current rate of 0.7944. No strong directional signals are applied given the absence of specific market-moving information beyond the current rate.
